123 
CLM_RP_IND_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Representative Payee (RP) Indicator Code 
DESCRIPTION: Claim representative payee (RP) indicator code. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_RP_IND_CD 
LONG NAME: CLM_RP_IND_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
R = bypass representative payee 
Null/missing = not applicable 
COMMENT: 
This field is used to designate by-passing of the prior
